emails.subject: Re: CONFIDENTIAL - Residential in CA
emails.body: I get so worked up over this issue... I really think now is the time to speak up and dissent. Skilling told us at a floor meeting that as an organization we've made poor decisions in the past, and he believes it's because the people who disagreed with those decisions never spoke up. So help me out! From: Jeff Dasovich on 04/13/2001 12:34 PM Sent by: Jeff Dasovich

emails.subject: Re: CONFIDENTIAL - Residential in CA

emails.subject: Re: CONFIDENTIAL - Residential in CA
emails.body: Were you on the call yesterday---I went ballistic. And where are you now!?! The calls underway. Karen Denne 04/13/2001 12:45 PM
